scripts.test: echo 'e2e tests run via test:e2e (requires emulators)'
scripts.test:withEmulators: pnpm dlx firebase-tools@15.15.0 --project demo-local emulators:exec --only auth,firestore --config ../firebase/emulator/firebase.json 'pnpm --filter @firebase-desk/emulator-tools seed && pnpm --filter @firebase-desk/e2e test:e2e'
